widget.convert: {"templates": {"default": (25, [ MultiContentEntryText(pos = (0, 0), size = (35, 25),font = 0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT,text = 1), # key, MultiContentEntryText(pos = (40, 0),size = (60, 25),font = 0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT,text = 2), # number, MultiContentEntryText(pos = (110, 0), size = (120, 25), font = 0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT,text = 3), # description, MultiContentEntryText(pos = (240, 0), size = (200, 25), font = 0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT,text = 4), # language, MultiContentEntryText(pos = (450, 4), size = (90, 25),font = 1, flags = RT_HALIGN_RIGHT, text = 5), # selection, ], True, "showNever"), "notselected": (25, [ MultiContentEntryText(pos = (0, 0), size = (35, 25),font = 0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT,text = 1), # key, MultiContentEntryText(pos = (40, 0),size = (60, 25),font = 0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT,text = 2), # number, MultiContentEntryText(pos = (110, 0), size = (120, 25), font = 0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT,text = 3), # description, MultiContentEntryText(pos = (240, 0), size = (200, 25), font = 0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT,text = 4), # language, MultiContentEntryText(pos = (450, 4), size = (90, 25),font = 1, flags = RT_HALIGN_RIGHT, text = 5), # selection, ], False, "showNever") }, "fonts": [gFont("Regular", 20), gFont("Regular", 16)], "itemHeight": 25 }

{"template": [ MultiContentEntryText(pos=(0,4), size=(280, 22), text = 1, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER, backcolor = MultiContentTemplateColor(3)), MultiContentEntryText(pos=(280,4), size=(100, 22), text = 2, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER, backcolor = MultiContentTemplateColor(3)) ], "fonts": [gFont("Regular", 23)], "itemHeight": 30 }

{"template": [ MultiContentEntryText(pos = (130, 17), size = (550, 60), flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 1), # index 1 is the language name, MultiContentEntryPixmap(pos = (20, 10), size = (60, 40), png = 2), # index 2 is the pixmap ], "fonts": [gFont("RegularLight", 26)], "itemHeight": 60 }

screen.name: MessageBox
screen.title: Message
screen.applet:
# this should be factored out into some helper code,but currently demonstrates applets. from enigma import eSize,ePoint orgwidth = self.instance.size().width() orgpos = self.instance.position() textsize = self["text"].getSize()
textsize = (textsize[0] + 60,textsize[1] + 60) offset = 30 if self.type == self.TYPE_YESNO: offset = 80 wsizex = textsize[0] + 80 wsizey = textsize[1] + offset if (280 > wsizex): wsizex = 280 wsize = (wsizex,wsizey)
# resize self.instance.resize(eSize(*wsize))
# resize label self["text"].instance.resize(eSize(*textsize))
# move list listsize = (wsizex - 20,64) self["list"].instance.move(ePoint(10,textsize[1])) self["list"].instance.resize(eSize(*listsize))
# center window newwidth = wsize[0] self.instance.move(ePoint(orgpos.x() + (orgwidth - newwidth)/2,orgpos.y()))

widget.convert: {"template": [ MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (10, 10), size = (54, 54), png = 3), # index 3 is the interface pixmap MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (71, 46), size = (15, 16), png = 4), # index 4 is the default pixmap MultiContentEntryText(pos = (100, 2), size = (520, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_TOP, text = 1), # index 1 is the interfacename MultiContentEntryText(pos = (100, 42), size = (520, 25), font=1, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_BOTTOM, text = 2), # index 2 is the description ], "fonts": [gFont("RegularLight", 28),gFont("RegularLight", 20)], "itemHeight": 75 }

{"template": [ MultiContentEntryText(pos = (10, 8), size = (680, 30), flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 1), # index 1 is the nim name, MultiContentEntryText(pos = (50, 43), size = (640, 45), font = 1, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT | RT_VALIGN_CENTER | RT_WRAP, text = 2), # index 2 is a description of the nim settings, ], "fonts": [gFont("RegularLight", 26), gFont("RegularLight", 20)], "itemHeight": 110 }

skin.screen:
Default
Format:%A, %d %B
ckgroundColor="maxBackground" font="RegularLight;35" position="70,47" size="800,43" text="Reception Settings" transparent="1" />

widget.convert: {"template": [ MultiContentEntryText(pos = (10, 8), size = (650, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 0), # index 0 is the essid MultiContentEntryText(pos = (10, 43), size = (210, 25), font=1, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 5), # index 5 is the interface MultiContentEntryText(pos = (230, 43), size = (210, 25), font=1, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 4), # index 0 is the encryption MultiContentEntryText(pos = (450, 8), size = (220, 25), font=1, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 2), # index 0 is the signal MultiContentEntryText(pos = (450, 43), size = (220, 25), font=1, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 3), # index 0 is the maxrate ], "fonts": [gFont("RegularLight", 28),gFont("RegularLight", 20)], "itemHeight": 75 }

{"template": [ MultiContentEntryText(pos = (60, 5), size = (620, 28), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 0), # index 2 is the Menu Titel MultiContentEntryText(pos = (70, 35), size = (610, 20), font=1, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 2), # index 3 is the Description MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (10, 6), size = (48, 48), png = 3), # index 4 is the pixmap ], "fonts": [gFont("Regular", 26),gFont("Regular", 18)], "itemHeight": 60 }

{"template": [ MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (40, 6), size = (48, 48), png = 0), # index 0 is the isMounted pixmap MultiContentEntryText(pos = (210, 5), size = (200, 28), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 1), # index 1 is the sharename MultiContentEntryText(pos = (390, 8), size = (250, 20), font=1, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 2), # index 2 is the IPdescription MultiContentEntryText(pos = (210, 35), size = (350, 20), font=1, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 3), # index 3 is the DIRdescription MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (600, 15), size = (48, 48), png = 4), # index 4 is the activepng pixmap MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (630, 6), size = (48, 48), png = 5), # index 4 is the mounttype pixmap ], "fonts": [gFont("RegularLight", 26),gFont("RegularLight", 18)], "itemHeight": 60 }

{"template": [ MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (10, 6), size = (48, 48), png = 1), # index 1 is the expandable/expanded/verticalline icon MultiContentEntryText(pos = (70, 4), size = (600, 26), font=2, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 2), # index 2 is the Hostname MultiContentEntryText(pos = (160, 5), size = (510, 25), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 3), # index 3 is the sharename MultiContentEntryText(pos = (160, 32), size = (510, 17), font=1, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT, text = 4), # index 4 is the sharedescription MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (65, 6), size = (48, 48), png = 5), # index 5 is the nfs/cifs icon MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (110, 6), size = (48, 48), png = 6), # index 6 is the isMounted icon ], "fonts": [gFont("RegularLight", 22),gFont("RegularLight", 17),gFont("RegularLight", 24)], "itemHeight": 60 }

screen.title: Select Cam and press OK to activate

screen.name: VuplusAuthenticity
screen.title: Return the Love Event (only for genuine box)

eLabel.name: new eLabel
eLabel.text: Die roten Quadrate genau in den Ecken positionieren

widget.convert: {"template": [ MultiContentEntryText(pos = (5, 2), size = (80, 20), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 0), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (100, 2), size = (110, 20), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_RIGHT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 1), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (225, 2), size = (110, 20), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_RIGHT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 2), ], "fonts": [gFont("Regular", 18),gFont("Regular", 16)], "itemHeight": 24, "selectionEnabled": False }

screen.name: AutoShutDownFile
screen.title: Select a media file for AutoShutDown
